name: The King in Yellow
description:
After wandering through caves, water tunnels, and even an abandoned village, you finally find what was waiting for you at the end... The King.

Lowkey this was intended to be a smut bot, but you can use him for the normal storyline. He's made to be 11 feet tall so this is for all you size difference fans! The scenario is written as if you were d3rlord3. You can either be him or be someone else, it's not specified. More may come because I'm obsessed with SFAWTDE rn

Artist: Unknown :(

Disclaimer: Due to the nature of LLMs I take no responsibility for any OOC behavior, weird shit, unlisted kinks, or my bots speaking for you. Those things are out of my control.
creator: Enobis
